title: Zero In Flea Killer Kit, Includes Flea Killer Spray and Flea Killer Powder & ZER024 Home Flea Powder (Treatment for Carpets and Rugs in the Home, Kills Fleas and Larvae, 300 g, Green
features: Product 1: Flea Killer Kit from Zero In: contains ZER024 Home Flea Powder 300g and ZER026 Home Flea Spray 300ml
Product 1: Effective treatment for fleas: Flea Killer Kit acts quickly against both cat and dog fleas in the home, targeting adult fleas and larvae

Product 1: Suitable for use on home furnishings: controls flea problems in household living areas. Use to treat pet bedding, baskets, carpets, cushions and rugs. Not suitable for use directly on pets, humans or human bedding
Product 1: Ready to use: ready for application around the home. No dilution or set-up is required - simply apply according to the instructions
Product 2: Puffer pack flea powder treatment for household carpets, pet bedding, living areas, rugs and soft furnishings with fresh fragrance
Product 2: Easy to use flea powder for the home kills cat and dog fleas and larvae; simply shake then vacuum off
Product 2: Flea powder treatment comes in puffer pack for simple home application and treats up to 10 sq m
Product 2: Powder kills cat and dog fleas and their larvae from household carpets, sofas, rugs and pet bedding
description: From the manufacturer TARGETS HOUSEHOLD PESTS Zero In brings you a comprehensive range of pest control solutions for household pests, including flies, wasps, mosquitoes, bed bugs, fleas, clothes moths and more. Everything you need to live pest-free Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Zero In Home Flea Attack Pack Off-pet treatment for protection against fleas Effectively protect home living areas from flea infestations with immediate knockdown treatment from Zero In. Treat fabrics, pet bedding, baskets, rugs and carpets to kill fleas and larvae on contact and provide long-lasting protection from fleas in the home both during and after infestation. Not for use on your pet(s) but to treat living areas your pet occupies to prevent further discomfort and stop infestation. Chemical control of clothes moths. Please follow the on-pack directions for use. Kills fleas and larvae on contact. For use on bedding, baskets, cushions and rugs. Provides long-lasting protection. Not for direct use on pets. Use as directed. Product Highlights Lasting Protection The advanced formula provides lasting control of fleas and larvae in the home even after the infestation has been dealt with. Kills Fleas Fast Powerful formulation kills fleas and their larvae on contact to help stop breeding cycles and reduce the chance of repeat infestation. Off-Pet Treatment Not for direct use on animals but for treating living areas (bedding, baskets, cushions and rugs) your pet occupies to prevent further discomfort and stop infestation. All-Round Protection Zero In brings you a wide range of home flea control solutions including poison-free traps, aerosols, natural flea killers and more - everything you need to protect the whole family against flea infestations. TARGETS HOUSEHOLD PESTS Zero In brings you a comprehensive range of pest control solutions for household pests, including flies, wasps, mosquitoes, bed bugs, fleas, clothes moths and more. Everything you need to live pest-free Professional-quality products you can trust Experts in pest control for over 25 years Zero In Home Flea Powder – 300g Off-pet treatment for protection against fleas Treat pet bedding, baskets, rugs and carpets to kill fleas and larvae on contact with Zero In Home Flea Powder. The powder formulation provides an easy way to rid your home of fleas and leaving a fresh fragrance behind. The dry treatment also avoids staining of delicate textiles. 300g provides enough to treat 10 square metres. Not for use on your pet(s) but to treat living areas your pet occupies to prevent further discomfort and stop infestation. Contains permethrin. Kills fleas and larvae in living areas. Dry treatment helps avoid staining. Fresh scented fragrance. Not for direct use on pets. Understanding Household Fleas Signs of Fleas Irregular scratching and irritation is usually the first sign that a pet has fleas. Closer inspection will usually reveal the 2mm long insects, as well as black droppings, in their coat and bedding. As fleas can cause more serious health problems than just the initial itch, it's vital to treat both the pet and their home environment to prevent further infestations. Causes of Fleas Dogs and cats often get infested with fleas through contact with other animals or from fleas in the environment. Although fleas lay their eggs in the fur of animals, these can easily fall off pets and become embedded in bedding, carpets and rugs where they may lay dormant for a number of weeks, especially in colder weather, which can lead to repeat infestation further down the line. Treatment & Prevention Flea eggs are almost impossible to see, but using Zero In Flea Killer trap is an ideal way to detect fleas as they hatch in and around living areas. Apply Zero In flea control products to pet bedding and household furniture, as well as surrounding areas, for effective control of adult fleas and their eggs, and also to prevent repeat infestations. To treat pets directly use the Zero In Flea Killer Comb. Vacuum and wash pet bedding regularly.
